meta.title: O1 Lab Inventory
meta.description: Complete inventory of equipment, components, tools, and supplies available at O1 Lab. Browse and search to plan your next project.

items.name: 5V Battery Connector (JST-type)
items.description: JST-style 2-pin battery connectors commonly used in small electronics, RC gear, and battery packs.

items.name: DVR Socket Male + Female Pair
items.description: Matched pair of male and female DVR connectors for audio/video signal connections.
items.notes: Male and female DVR connectors

items.name: 2-Channel Connector (2-pin housing + crimp)
items.description: JST-style 2-pin wire-to-wire connectors with crimp terminals. Great for making detachable wiring harnesses.
items.notes: 2-pin JST-style wire-to-wire connectors

items.name: USB-C Breakout (solder-ready)
items.description: USB-C connectors ready to solder onto your own PCB or perfboard. Access USB-C power and data lines directly.
items.notes: Ready to solder USB-C connectors

items.name: USB-A Female Socket (short body)
items.description: Standard USB-A female sockets for panel mounting or PCB integration. Accept standard USB-A plugs.

items.name: USB-A Male Plug
items.description: Standard USB-A male plugs for making custom USB cables or devices.

items.name: DIANN USB Type-C Breakout Board (5pcs PCB)
items.description: Female USB-C connector mounted on a breakout PCB for easy prototyping. Solder wires directly to labelled pads.
items.notes: Female USB-C connector on breakout PCB; ready for soldering; Amazon 27/02/2026

items.name: 1.5V Single Battery Holder
items.description: Holds one AA or AAA battery (1.5V). Simple way to add portable power to a project.
items.notes: Holds 1x AA/AAA

items.name: 1.5V Double Battery Holder
items.description: Holds two AA or AAA batteries in series for 3V output. Good for powering small motors and LEDs.
items.notes: Holds 2x AA/AAA (3V series)

items.name: 1.5V Triple Battery Holder
items.description: Holds three AA or AAA batteries in series for 4.5V output. Suitable for many 5V-tolerant circuits.
items.notes: Holds 3x AA/AAA (4.5V series)

items.name: Photoresistor (LDR / Light Dependent Resistor)
items.description: Resistance changes with light intensity. Use for light-sensing projects like automatic nightlights, light meters, or plant monitors.
items.notes: Resistance varies with light intensity

items.name: 1M Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 1 Megohm fixed resistor. High resistance value used in timing circuits, pull-ups, and sensor interfaces.
items.notes: 1 Megohm

items.name: 46K Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 46 Kilohm fixed resistor. Less common value — verify colour band markings before use.
items.notes: 46 Kilohm (less common value; verify marking)

items.name: 100K Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 100 Kilohm fixed resistor. Common value for voltage dividers, pull-ups, and filter circuits.
items.notes: 100 Kilohm

items.name: 4.6K Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 4.6 Kilohm fixed resistor. Less common value — verify colour band markings before use.
items.notes: 4.6 Kilohm (less common value; verify marking)

items.name: 10K Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 10 Kilohm fixed resistor. One of the most common resistor values — essential for pull-ups, pull-downs, and voltage dividers.
items.notes: 10 Kilohm

items.name: 1K Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 1 Kilohm fixed resistor. Commonly used as an LED current-limiting resistor and in general circuits.
items.notes: 1 Kilohm

items.name: 100 Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 100 Ohm fixed resistor. Used for current limiting, signal termination, and LED circuits.

items.name: 10K Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film) — Batch 2
items.description: Second batch of 10 Kilohm resistors. Same specs as primary batch.
items.notes: 10 Kilohm (second batch)

items.name: 470 Ohm Resistor (1/4W Carbon Film)
items.description: 470 Ohm fixed resistor. Classic value for driving LEDs from 5V logic (Arduino, etc.).

items.name: Linear Potentiometer
items.description: Panel-mount linear taper potentiometer. Variable resistor for adjusting volume, brightness, speed, or reading analog input.
items.notes: Linear taper panel-mount pots

items.name: Assorted LEDs (mixed colours/sizes)
items.description: Mixed bag of through-hole LEDs in various colours and sizes. Perfect for indicators, decorations, and learning basic circuits.
items.notes: Mixed through-hole LEDs; colours/sizes unverified

items.name: Small 3-Pin Slider Switch (SPDT)
items.description: Single-pole double-throw slide switch. Simple on/off or mode-select switch for projects.
items.notes: 3-pin single-pole double-throw slide switch

items.name: 6-Position DIP Switch Array (blue)
items.description: 6 independent on/off switches in a single DIP package. Use for setting configuration bits, addresses, or mode selection.
items.notes: 6 independent on/off switches per unit (60 switches total)

items.name: Misc Pushbuttons / Keycap Buttons with Caps
items.description: Assorted tactile and push buttons with coloured keycaps. Great for user interfaces, controls, and input projects.
items.notes: Assorted tactile/push buttons with coloured keycaps

items.name: Micro Limit Switch (lever actuated)
items.description: Snap-action microswitch with lever. Detects physical contact or end-of-travel — used in 3D printers, CNC, and robotics.
items.notes: Snap-action limit/microswitch

items.name: KW12-3 Micro Limit Switch SPDT with Roller Lever (10pcs)
items.description: SPDT micro limit switches with roller lever arm. 1NO 1NC contacts rated 5A at 250VAC. Ideal for endstops and mechanical triggers.
items.notes: 1NO 1NC; 5A 250VAC; for endstops and mechanical triggers

items.name: 1N4007 Rectifier Diode (1A 1000V)
items.description: General-purpose silicon rectifier diode. Blocks reverse current, protects circuits, and rectifies AC to DC. An essential component.
items.notes: 2 packs of ~75; standard silicon rectifier diode; M1C is SMD equivalent marking

items.name: 330uF 16V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 330 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 16V. Used for power supply filtering and energy storage.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 47uF 25V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 47 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 25V. Common for power filtering and audio circuits.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 470uF 16V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 470 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 16V. High capacitance for smoothing power rails and motor supplies.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 220uF 16V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 220 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 16V. General-purpose filtering and decoupling.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 100uF 16V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 100 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 16V. Versatile value for general power supply work.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 4.7uF 50V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 4.7 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 50V. Good for signal coupling and small bypass applications.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 1uF 50V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 1 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 50V. Common in timing, coupling, and filter circuits.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 2.2uF 50V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 2.2 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 50V.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 33uF 16V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 33 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 16V.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 3.3uF 50V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 3.3 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 50V.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 10uF 50V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 10 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 50V. Very common value for decoupling and power filtering.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 22uF 25V Electrolytic Capacitor
items.description: 22 microfarad electrolytic capacitor rated 25V.
items.notes: Part of 12-value assortment kit

items.name: 100F 2.7V Supercapacitor
items.description: 100 Farad supercapacitor at 2.7V. Massive energy storage in a small package — can power small circuits for minutes or provide burst current. Not a battery replacement but great for backup power and energy harvesting projects.
items.notes: Large capacity energy storage; low voltage

items.name: Ceramic Capacitor Assortment (960pcs, 24 values)
items.description: 960 ceramic disc capacitors across 24 values from 2pF to 0.1uF at 50V. Organized in a storage box. Essential for high-frequency filtering, decoupling ICs, and signal work.
items.notes: Organized storage box; complements donated electrolytic set

items.name: Transistor Assortment Kit (20 types x 5 each)
items.description: Kit of approximately 100 transistors across 20 types. Likely includes common NPN (2N2222, 2N3904, BC547), PNP (2N3906), and MOSFETs. Used for switching, amplification, and motor control.
items.notes: Mixed NPN/PNP/MOSFET; likely includes common types (2N2222/2N3904/2N3906/BC547/S8050 etc.)

items.name: Single Digit 7-Segment Display (0.56in, Common Cathode)
items.description: Red single-digit 7-segment LED display. Shows numbers 0-9. Great first display project — learn multiplexing and segment driving.
items.notes: Red; 0.56 inch; 10-pin common cathode

items.name: 4-Digit 7-Segment Display (0.36in, Common Cathode)
items.description: Red 4-digit 7-segment display. Perfect for clocks, counters, temperature readouts, and scoreboards.
items.notes: Red; 0.36 inch; 12-pin common cathode

items.name: 4-Digit 7-Segment Display (0.56in, Common Cathode)
items.description: Larger 4-digit 7-segment display for more visible readouts. 0.56 inch digits are easy to read from a distance.
items.notes: Red; 0.56 inch; 12-pin common cathode

items.name: 8x8 LED Dot Matrix Display (Red)
items.description: 64-LED dot matrix in an 8x8 grid. Display scrolling text, simple animations, or pixel art. Requires multiplexing or a MAX7219 driver.
items.notes: Red; 8x8 (64 LEDs); 16-pin; row/column multiplexed

items.name: 16x2 LCD Display with I2C Backpack
items.description: Classic 16-character by 2-line LCD with I2C adapter pre-soldered. Only needs 4 wires (VCC, GND, SDA, SCL). Display text, sensor readings, menus. One of the easiest displays to get started with.
items.notes: HD44780-compatible LCD with PCF8574 I2C adapter soldered on

items.name: 0.96in TFT LCD Display (SPI, 8-pin)
items.description: Tiny colour TFT LCD with SPI interface and ST7735S driver. Display colour graphics, images, and gauges on a 0.96 inch screen.
items.notes: 0.96 inch colour TFT; SPI interface; ST7735S driver IC; 8 pins

items.name: 0.96in OLED Display (I2C, 4-pin)
items.description: Tiny monochrome OLED display with I2C interface. Crisp contrast, low power, and only 4 wires needed. Popular for wearables, dashboards, and compact readouts.
items.notes: 0.96 inch monochrome OLED; I2C interface; 4 pins (VCC/GND/SDA/SCL)

items.name: Passive Piezo Buzzer (small round, 2-pin)
items.description: Passive piezo buzzer that needs a PWM or square wave signal to produce tones. Can play melodies, alarms, and notification sounds. Unlike active buzzers, you control the pitch.
items.notes: 2-pin; needs PWM/square wave signal to produce tone

items.name: LM2596 Step-Down (Buck) DC-DC Converter Module
items.description: Adjustable voltage step-down converter. Takes 3-40V input and outputs 1.5-35V at up to 3A. Essential for powering 3.3V or 5V circuits from higher voltage supplies like 12V.
items.notes: Adjustable output; typically 3-40V input to 1.5-35V output; 3A max

items.name: 12V 29A 350W Switching Power Supply Brick
items.description: High-power mains AC to 12VDC switching supply. 350 watts at 29 amps — enough to drive LED strips, motors, 3D printer heated beds, and other high-current loads.
items.notes: Mains AC to 12VDC; 350W; 29A output

items.name: 5VDC SPDT Relay Module
items.description: Single-channel relay module controlled by 5V logic. Switch mains-powered devices, motors, or lights on and off from a microcontroller. Has normally-open and normally-closed contacts.
items.notes: Single channel 5V relay; normally open/closed contacts; ~10A switching

items.name: MT3608 DC-DC Step-Up Boost Module (5pcs)
items.description: Adjustable voltage step-up (boost) converter. Takes 2-24V input and boosts up to 28V output, max 2A. Great for running 12V devices from a 5V USB supply or stepping up battery voltage.
items.notes: Input 2-24V; adjustable output up to 28V via 25-turn trimpot; max 2A

items.name: SG90 Micro Servo Motor (180 deg)
items.description: Tiny 9-gram servo motor with 180-degree range. Perfect for robotic arms, pan/tilt mechanisms, door locks, and animatronics. Runs on 4.8-6V, controlled by PWM signal.
items.notes: 9g micro servo; ~4.8-6V; plastic gears; 180 degree range

items.name: 28BYJ-48 5VDC Stepper Motor with ULN2003 Driver Board
items.description: 5V unipolar stepper motor with matching driver board. 64:1 gear ratio gives precise positioning. Great for learning stepper control, camera sliders, and automated curtains.
items.notes: 5V unipolar stepper; 64:1 gear ratio; includes ULN2003 driver PCB

items.name: Mini Geared DC Motor (4-pin, possible stepper)
items.description: Small geared motors with 4 pins and 9-10 tooth output gear. Feels stepped when turned — likely small 2-phase stepper motors. Good for low-speed precision applications.
items.notes: 4 pins with 9-10 tooth gear; feels stepped when turning; likely small 2-phase stepper motor (not coded)

items.name: Tiny DC Motor (2-pin)
items.description: Small brushed DC motors with 2 terminal tabs. Simple to drive — just apply voltage. Great for fans, vibration motors, and learning basic motor control.
items.notes: Small brushed DC motor; 2 terminal tabs

items.name: DC Motor in Yellow TT Gearbox Housing
items.description: Standard TT (toy/tank tread) gearbox motors. The go-to motor for robot car chassis — 3-6V, fits standard TT wheel hubs. Build a line-follower or remote-controlled car.
items.notes: Standard TT motor; commonly 3-6V; used in robot car chassis kits

items.name: Miscellaneous Small DC Motors
items.description: Assorted loose brushed DC motors of unknown specifications. Test with a bench supply to determine voltage and speed.
items.notes: Assorted loose brushed DC motors; specs unknown

items.name: Arduino Uno (ATmega328P)
items.description: The classic beginner microcontroller board. 14 digital I/O pins, 6 analog inputs, USB-B programming. Massive community, thousands of tutorials. The best place to start learning electronics and coding.
items.notes: 14 digital I/O; 6 analog in; USB-B; 5V logic

items.name: Arduino Mega (ATmega2560)
items.description: Arduino board with massive I/O — 54 digital pins, 16 analog inputs. Use when you need more pins than an Uno, like running multiple motors, displays, and sensors simultaneously.
items.notes: 54 digital I/O; 16 analog in; USB-B; 5V logic

items.name: Arduino Nano (ATmega328P)
items.description: Compact Arduino with the same chip as the Uno but in a breadboard-friendly form factor. Ideal for space-constrained projects and permanent installations.
items.notes: Compact form factor; 14 digital I/O; 8 analog in; Mini-USB; 5V logic

items.name: Arduino Bluetooth Module (HC-05/HC-06)
items.description: Serial Bluetooth module that pairs with Arduino via UART. Add wireless control to any project — control from your phone or communicate between devices.
items.notes: Serial Bluetooth module; pairs with Arduino via UART

items.name: Raspberry Pi 3 Model B+
items.description: Full Linux single-board computer. 1.4GHz quad-core ARM, 1GB RAM, WiFi, Bluetooth, Ethernet, 40-pin GPIO. Run Python, host web servers, process camera feeds, or build a media centre. Needs a microSD card and 5V/2.5A power supply.
items.notes: 1.4GHz quad-core ARM; 1GB RAM; WiFi; BLE; Ethernet; 40-pin GPIO; needs microSD + 5V/2.5A PSU

items.name: ESP32-WROOM Dev Board (WiFi + BLE)
items.description: Powerful dual-core 240MHz microcontroller with built-in WiFi and Bluetooth. The go-to board for IoT projects — connect to the internet, build smart home devices, log sensor data to the cloud. 3.3V logic (use level shifters with 5V sensors).
items.notes: Dual-core 240MHz; WiFi 802.11 b/g/n; BLE 4.2; ~30 GPIO; 3.3V logic

items.name: Incremental Rotary Encoder (1000 PPR)
items.description: Industrial-grade rotary encoder with 1000 pulses per revolution. NPN open-collector A/B channel outputs at 24V. Use for precise position and speed measurement on shafts and wheels.
items.notes: Industrial rotary encoder; 1000 pulses/rev; 24V supply; NPN open collector output (A/B channels)

items.name: Encoder Signal Conditioning / Breakout PCB
items.description: Small breakout boards for connecting rotary encoders to microcontrollers. Provides labelled output pins (CLK, DT, SCK, VCC) for clean signal interfacing.
items.notes: Small green PCBs; output pins (CLK/DT/SCK/VCC); interface board for encoder-to-MCU connection

items.name: Soil Moisture / Water Level Sensor
items.description: Resistive probe sensors for measuring soil moisture or water level. Analog output — read with any microcontroller. Great for automated plant watering systems.
items.notes: 1x soil sensor + 1x soil/water sensor; resistive probe type; analog output

items.name: RFID Reader Module with Card
items.description: 13.56MHz RFID reader with SPI interface. Includes one RFID card/tag. Build access control systems, attendance trackers, or inventory management. Uses the popular MFRC522 chip.
items.notes: 13.56MHz RFID reader; SPI interface; includes 1x RFID card/tag

items.name: Assorted Microcontroller Sensor/Receiver Kit
items.description: Bag of approximately 30 miscellaneous sensor modules. Likely includes common modules such as DHT11 (temperature/humidity), IR receiver, ultrasonic distance, flame detector, tilt, and sound sensor. Identify and test individually.
items.notes: Bag of misc sensors; likely includes common modules (DHT11/IR/ultrasonic/flame/tilt/sound etc.)

items.name: 4x4 Pushbutton Matrix Keypad
items.description: 16-key matrix keypad with 8-pin interface (4 rows + 4 columns). Use for PIN entry, menu navigation, calculator builds, or any project needing numeric/character input.
items.notes: 16-key membrane or tactile keypad; 8-pin (4 row + 4 col) matrix

items.name: 16-Channel Analog Multiplexer (CD74HC4067)
items.description: Expands a single analog pin into 16 channels. Read up to 16 analog sensors using just one microcontroller analog input + 4 address pins.
items.notes: 16:1 analog mux/demux; 4 address pins + signal; expands analog inputs for MCU

items.name: Electronic Panel Meter
items.description: Small electronic panel meter — may be a voltmeter or ammeter. Mount in an enclosure to monitor voltage or current in your project.
items.notes: Small electronic panel meter; specs unverified; may be volt or amp meter

items.name: Vichip Module
items.description: Possibly a Vicor power conversion module. Needs further identification and datasheet lookup before use.
items.notes: Possibly a Vicor power conversion module; needs further identification

items.name: Unknown IC / Module (86C57PKE)
items.description: Unidentified integrated circuit. Needs datasheet lookup and visual inspection to determine function.
items.notes: Unidentified component; needs datasheet lookup / visual inspection

items.name: Unknown Component (B14-26-B-05)
items.description: Unidentified components. Needs visual inspection and datasheet lookup.
items.notes: Unidentified; needs visual inspection and datasheet lookup

items.name: Full-Size White Breadboard (830 tie-points)
items.description: Standard solderless breadboard with approximately 830 tie-points across 60 columns. The foundation of every electronics project — plug in components and wire them up without soldering.
items.notes: Standard solderless breadboard; ~165mm long

items.name: Half-Size White Breadboard (400 tie-points)
items.description: Compact solderless breadboard with approximately 400 tie-points. Good for smaller circuits or when space is limited.
items.notes: Compact solderless breadboard; ~85mm long

items.name: Full-Size Blue Breadboard (830 tie-points)
items.description: Full-size solderless breadboard in blue. Same function as standard white breadboards.
items.notes: Standard solderless breadboard; ~165mm long; blue

items.name: Green Prototyping PCB (assorted sizes)
items.description: Perforated and stripboard-style PCBs in various sizes. Use for making permanent soldered versions of breadboard prototypes.
items.notes: Perforated/stripboard style PCBs; various dimensions

items.name: Male-to-Male Breadboard Jumper Wires
items.description: Assorted lengths of male-to-male jumper wires for connecting points on a breadboard.
items.notes: Assorted lengths; for breadboard prototyping

items.name: Female-to-Male Breadboard Jumper Wires
items.description: Assorted lengths of female-to-male jumper wires for connecting boards (like Arduino) to breadboards or sensors with pin headers.
items.notes: Assorted lengths; for breadboard-to-board connections

items.name: Female-to-Female Breadboard Jumper Wires
items.description: Assorted lengths of female-to-female jumper wires for connecting boards and modules with male pin headers directly together.
items.notes: Assorted lengths; for board-to-board connections

items.name: Hook-Up Wire Spool (Green)
items.description: Spool of green stranded hook-up wire for soldering and permanent connections.
items.notes: Stranded wire; for soldering and permanent connections

items.name: Hook-Up Wire Spool (Black)
items.description: Spool of black stranded hook-up wire. Commonly used for ground connections.
items.notes: Stranded wire; for soldering and permanent connections

items.name: Hook-Up Wire Spool (Blue)
items.description: Spool of blue stranded hook-up wire for colour-coded wiring.
items.notes: Stranded wire; for soldering and permanent connections

items.name: Hook-Up Wire Spool (Brown)
items.description: Spool of brown stranded hook-up wire for colour-coded wiring.
items.notes: Stranded wire; for soldering and permanent connections

items.name: Duratool Allen Key Set (1.3mm to 10mm)
items.description: Set of 11 hex/Allen keys ranging from 1.3mm to 10mm. Essential for assembling 3D printers, tightening bolts, and general mechanical work.
items.notes: Hex key set; 11 sizes from 1.3mm to 10mm

items.name: TENMA PRO 72-2685 Bench Top Power Supply (0-30V, 0-3A)
items.description: Professional adjustable bench power supply. Dial in any voltage from 0-30V and current limit from 0-3A. Essential lab equipment for testing and powering circuits safely.
items.notes: Dual bench PSUs; $199.00 each; received

items.name: Bambu Lab P1S 3D Printer (Combo with AMS)
items.description: High-speed enclosed 3D printer with Automatic Material System (AMS) for multi-colour printing. Print enclosures, brackets, gears, and custom parts for your projects.
items.notes: Includes AMS; ordered via Bambu Lab

items.name: Bambu Lab P1S 3D Printer (Standard)
items.description: High-speed enclosed 3D printer. Same excellent print quality as the Combo unit, without the AMS multi-material system.
items.notes: Ordered via Bambu Lab

items.name: Bambu Smooth PEI Plate (X1/P1/A1 Series)
items.description: Smooth PEI build plate for Bambu Lab printers. Gives a glossy bottom finish on prints and excellent adhesion.
items.notes: Combo deal item

items.name: Antistatic ESD Soldering Silicone Mat
items.description: Heat-resistant silicone mat that protects your work surface during soldering. Antistatic properties help protect sensitive electronic components.
items.notes: $1.43 each

items.name: upHere 120mm Computer Case Fan (Black)
items.description: 120mm cooling fans repurposed for fume extraction and ventilation builds. Use with a filter or ducting for soldering fume removal.
items.notes: 120mm cooling fans; for fume extraction / ventilation builds

items.name: PLA Matte - Matte Marine Blue (1kg spool)
items.description: 1kg spool of matte marine blue PLA filament for 3D printing. Matte finish hides layer lines and gives a premium look.

items.name: PLA Basic - Sunflower Yellow (1kg spool)
items.description: 1kg spool of sunflower yellow PLA filament for 3D printing.

items.name: PLA Matte - Matte Mandarin Orange (1kg spool)
items.description: 1kg spool of matte mandarin orange PLA filament for 3D printing.

items.name: PLA Matte - Matte Charcoal (1kg spool)
items.description: 1kg spool of matte charcoal PLA filament for 3D printing. Dark neutral colour, great for enclosures and structural parts.

items.name: PLA Matte - Matte Ivory White (1kg refill)
items.description: 1kg refill of matte ivory white PLA filament. Refill format — no spool included, loads into existing Bambu AMS spools.

items.name: PLA Matte - Matte Lemon Yellow (1kg refill)
items.description: 1kg refill of matte lemon yellow PLA filament.

items.name: PLA Matte - Matte Dark Green (1kg refill)
items.description: 1kg refill of matte dark green PLA filament.

items.name: PLA Basic - Gray (1kg spool)
items.description: 1kg spool of gray PLA filament for 3D printing.

items.name: PLA Basic - Cocoa Brown (1kg spool)
items.description: 1kg spool of cocoa brown PLA filament for 3D printing.

items.name: 3M Medium Paint Project Reusable Half Facepiece Respirator
items.description: Reusable half-face respirator for protection from fumes and particles during soldering, painting, and 3D printer operation.
items.notes: Semi-personal; removable if budget needed

items.name: ESD Silicone Soldering Mat (TE-610, 35x25cm)
items.description: Heat-resistant ESD soldering mat rated to 500 degrees C. Has organized slots for screws and small parts to keep your workspace tidy.
items.notes: Heat resistant 500C; organized slots for screws and parts

items.name: Ansell Nitrile Disposable Gloves 36pk M/L
items.description: Disposable nitrile gloves for handling chemicals, resins, and messy materials safely.

items.name: Microfibre Cleaning Cloths All Set 20pk
items.description: Pack of 20 microfibre cloths for cleaning equipment, screens, and work surfaces.

items.name: Sabco Bamboo All Purpose Scrub Brush
items.description: General-purpose scrub brush for cleaning work surfaces and equipment.

items.name: All Set 1L Clear Plastic Spray Bottle
items.description: 1-litre spray bottle for cleaning solutions or IPA (isopropyl alcohol).

items.name: All Set Sponge Scourer 10pk Grey/Charcoal
items.description: Pack of 10 sponge scourers for cleaning and maintenance.

items.name: Exonic Dishwashing Liquid 1L
items.description: 1-litre dishwashing liquid for general lab cleaning.

items.name: Weller Rosin Core Solder Wire 1.0mm 60/40 85g
items.description: 85g spool of 60/40 tin-lead solder with rosin flux core. 1.0mm diameter — good all-round size for through-hole and general soldering work.
items.notes: 60/40 tin-lead; 1.0mm diameter; rosin core flux; 85g spool

items.name: Desoldering Braid / Solder Wick (2.0-3.5mm, 1.5m)
items.description: Fine braided copper wick for removing solder. Place over a solder joint and apply heat — the braid absorbs the molten solder. Essential for fixing mistakes and SMD rework.
items.notes: Fine braided copper; for removing solder bridges and SMD cleanup

items.name: Kaisi Solder Sucker Desoldering Pump
items.description: Manual vacuum desoldering pump. Spring-loaded plunger creates suction to remove molten solder from through-hole joints.
items.notes: Manual vacuum desoldering pump

items.name: ABS Soldering Helping Hands Cable Holder (4pcs set)
items.description: Set of 4 adjustable spring clamp holders with suction bracket base. Hold wires and small parts in place while soldering.
items.notes: Adjustable spring clamp holders with suction bracket

items.name: Mini Heat Gun 300W 220V + 164pcs Heat Shrink Tubes
items.description: Portable 300W handheld heat gun for heat-shrinking tubing, bending plastics, and drying. Includes 164 assorted heat shrink tubes.
items.notes: Portable handheld; includes 164 assorted heat shrink tubes

items.name: Solder Helping Hands with Magnifying Glass Station (5 Flexible Arms)
items.description: Third-hand soldering station with 5 flexible gooseneck arms and built-in magnifying glass. Hold PCBs and components at any angle while you solder.
items.notes: Third hand station; 5 flexible arm clamps; built-in magnifying glass

items.name: SN-28B Ratchet Crimper + 1550pcs Dupont Connector Kit
items.description: Ratcheting crimp tool (0.25-1.0mm wire) with 1550 Dupont connectors — male/female crimp pins plus 2.54mm housings from 1x1P to 1x10P. Make custom cables for any pin header.
items.notes: Crimper 0.25-1.0mm; 1x1P-1x10P housings; 2.54mm male/female crimp pins

items.name: Automatic Wire Stripper & Multi-Crimper (10-24AWG)
items.description: Self-adjusting wire stripper that handles 10-24 AWG wire. Also includes wire cutter and basic terminal crimping die. One tool for strip, cut, and crimp.
items.notes: Self-adjusting; includes wire cutter + basic terminal crimping die

items.name: RB1200 Deburring Tool Kit (handle + 11x BS1010 swivel blades)
items.description: Deburring tool with 360-degree swivelling blades. Clean up rough edges on 3D prints, cut metal, and drilled holes. Includes 11 replacement blades.
items.notes: 360 swiveling blades; for 3D print and metal edge cleanup

items.name: Greener Magnetizer / Demagnetizer Tool
items.description: Portable tool to add or remove magnetism from screwdriver tips and tweezers. Magnetized tips hold screws in place — essential for working in tight spaces.
items.notes: Portable; add/remove magnetism from screwdrivers and tweezers

items.name: Brass Heat-Set Threaded Insert Kit (1400pcs, M2-M8)
items.description: 1400 knurled brass threaded inserts in sizes M2, M2.5, M3, M4, M5, M6, and M8 at various lengths. Press into 3D printed parts with a soldering iron to create strong, reusable screw threads.
items.notes: Knurled brass; various lengths; for 3D print embedment with soldering iron

items.name: Neodymium Circular Magnets 4mm x 2mm N35 (200pcs)
items.description: 200 small rare-earth neodymium magnets (4mm diameter x 2mm thick, N35 grade). Perfect for 3D printed snap-fit lids, closures, and magnetic mounting.
items.notes: Rare-earth magnets; for 3D printed latches/closures

items.name: Stainless Steel Hardware Assortment (600pcs, M2-M5 Button Head Hex)
items.description: 600 stainless steel button head hex socket screws with matching nuts and washers in M2, M3, M4, and M5 sizes. For assembling enclosures, brackets, and mechanical assemblies.
items.notes: Button head hex socket screws + matching nuts + washers

items.name: Brass Hex PCB Standoff Kit (M2-M5, 5-20mm heights)
items.description: Brass hex standoffs in M2 to M5 sizes at various heights (5-20mm). Male-to-female threading for mounting PCBs, motherboards, and stacking boards with proper spacing.
items.notes: For mounting motherboards and PCBs; various heights

items.name: Miniature Ball Bearing Set (8x24x8mm + 3x6x2.5mm)
items.description: Set of 20 miniature ball bearings: 10x heavy-rotation bearings (8x24x8mm) for wheels and shafts, plus 10x precision bearings (3x6x2.5mm) for small motor shafts.
items.notes: 10x heavy rotation (8x24x8) + 10x precision motor shaft (3x6x2.5)

items.name: KY-019 1-Channel 5V Relay Module (5-pack) + Dupont leads
items.description: Pack of 5 optocoupler-isolated relay modules. Each switches up to 10A at 250VAC or 30VDC. Includes Dupont jumper leads. Control mains appliances, pumps, or heaters from a microcontroller.
items.notes: Optocoupler isolated; switching 10A 250VAC / 30VDC; includes 10cm Dupont lines

items.name: 4-Channel I2C Logic Level Converter 3.3V/5V (10pcs)
items.description: Bi-directional logic level shifters for safely connecting 3.3V devices (like ESP32) to 5V sensors and modules. 4 channels per board, 10 boards total.
items.notes: Bi-directional shifter; essential for ESP32 (3.3V) to 5V sensor interfacing

items.name: Banana Plug to Dupont Jumper Leads 26AWG (10pcs)
items.description: 10 leads with 4mm stackable banana plugs on one end and 2.54mm male Dupont pins on the other. Connect your Tenma bench power supply directly to breadboards and circuits.
items.notes: 4mm stackable banana to 2.54mm male Dupont; silicone wire; for Tenma PSU to breadboard

items.name: E27 Lamp Socket to Plug Adapter
items.description: Converts an E27 light bulb socket into a power outlet. PBT fireproof construction. Used for the Flower Project.
items.notes: Converts E27 light socket to power outlet; PBT fireproof; Flower Project

items.name: Renegade Industrial 26in 3-Drawer Black Middle Stacker Tool Chest
items.description: 660mm wide, 450mm deep, 256mm tall tool chest with 3 lockable drawers. Organize and secure lab tools and components.
items.notes: W660xD450xH256mm; 3 lockable drawers; 23kg
